Why Only 0.02% of Social Media Users Make a Living Online...

Billions of people scroll through social media every day. But behind the highlight reels and viral videos, only a tiny fraction—0.02%—are actually making a living from their content.

So, what separates the successful creators from the rest?

According to digital entrepreneur John Lee, it’s not talent, luck, or even a large following. Instead, it comes down to one thing: a system for turning content into cash flow.

"Most people use social media to kill time. The smart ones use it to kill their day job," says Lee, who built his own multi-7-figure content business from scratch.

His 7-Figure Creator Quest, now available on Mindvalley, teaches a proven system that helps creators:

📌 Monetize without needing 100K+ followers
📌 Use AI to streamline content & maximize reach
📌 Build multiple income streams with social media

If you’ve ever felt stuck—posting content but not seeing real financial results—this could be the turning point.

📌 Learn the strategy top creators are using today >>
